raw_sections.header:
T I T L E
TITLE: Vigil-AI
PROBLEM STATEMENT:
Fake and exaggerated resumes are a major issue in hiring, where candidates
misrepresent their skills without proper validation, leading to poor recruitment
decisions and productivity loss.
CATEGORY: AI & Machine Learning
TEAM NAME: RED TEAM
I D E A
- PROPOSED SOLUTION:
Vigia-AI is an powerful system that detects fake or exaggerated resumes by analyzing skill
claims and validating them through intelligent mini-tests and contextual evalution.
- HOW IT ADRESSES THE PROBLEM
1. Identifies inconsistencies between claimed and actual skills
2. Uses AI-generated mini-tests to validate real knowledge
3. Detects exaggeration through logic + AI analysis
4. Provides explainable results for recruiters
- INNOVATION & UNIQUENESS OF THE SOLUTION:
1. First system to combine resume analysis + real-time skill validation
2. Uses AI-generated questioning to expose exaggeration
3. Interactive verification instead of static screening
4. Student improvement mode as a secondary feature
“Instead of trusting what candidates claim, Vigil-AI verifies what they actually know”
T E C H N I C A L A P P R O A C H
- TECHNOLOGIES USED:
1. Programming languages: TypeScript, Python, GLSL, HTML/CSS
2. Frontend: Next.js, React, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion, Three.js, Chart.js, Axios, Lucide React
3. Backend: FastAPI, Uvicorn, Pydantic, httpx
4. Resume parsing: pdfplumber for PDF, python-docx for DOCX, python-dateutil for date extraction
5. AI integration: Groq API with Llama 3.3 70B Versatile
6. Data handling: in-memory storage for prototype stage
7. Visualization: charts, animated dashboard, and WebGL-based SentinelX particle core
8. Hardware: standard laptop/desktop with browser; internet required for live AI features
- Working Prototypes & Flowchart:
Current working prototypes:
1. Resume upload module for PDF and DOCX
2. Resume parser for extracting name, summary, skills, experience, education and
raw_sections.certifications:
3. Trust score and risk analysis engine
4. Skill verification matrix
5. Career timeline integrity checker
6. AI summary and recommendation generator
7. SentinelX recruiter assistant
8. Student Lab for interview question generation
9. Reports dashboard with visual analytics
T E C H N I C A L A P P R O A C H
Methodologies & Process for Implementation:
1. Used a modular full-stack architecture with separate frontend and backend
2. Followed an iterative development approach: build core analysis first, then dashboards, then AI assistant, then advanced UI
3. Applied a hybrid methodology:
Rule-based verification for consistency and explainability
AI-based evaluation for summary, recommendation, and recruiter assistance
4. Used explainable scoring so every result includes reasons, strengths, alerts, and recommendations
5. Implemented preprocessing steps such as text normalization, section detection, skill extraction, and date parsing
6. Used multi-factor scoring based on:
skill-to-evidence matching
timeline gaps and overlaps
keyword stuffing detection
communication clarity
education alignment
7. Designed a responsive UI for dashboard, reports, and assistant interaction
8. Optimized performance using WebGL particles and shader-based rendering for SentinelX
9. Validated the prototype through repeated testing with sample resumes and frontend/backend checks
F E A S I B I L I T Y A N A LY S I S
- Feasibility:
1. Uses existing AI APIs and web technologies → easy to implement
2. No special hardware required → scalable as SaaS
- Challenges & Risks:
Accuracy of skill validation
Possibility of incorrect AI judgments
- Solutions:
Combine AI + rule-based logic for better accuracy
Provide explainable results and user feedback loop
I M P A C T & B E N E F I T S
- Potential Impact On Target Audience
1. Helps recruiters and HR teams detect fake or exaggerated resume claims faster
2. Reduces manual screening effort through automated resume parsing and trust scoring
3. Improves interview quality by generating evidence-based validation questions
4. Supports fairer and more objective hiring decisions with explainable analysis
5. Helps students/candidates identify weak points and prepare stronger, more authentic resumes
- Benefits Of The Solution
1. Social: promotes transparent, merit-based hiring and reduces fraud in recruitment
2. Economic: saves recruiter time, lowers screening cost, and reduces the risk of bad hires
3. Organizational: improves hiring efficiency, decision confidence, and quality of shortlisted candidates
4. Educational: guides students in building honest, skill-backed resumes and better interview preparation
5. Environmental: reduces paper-based screening and supports a fully digital hiring workflow
